gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/114)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/114)
text: كَانَ أَبُو الْحَسَنِ ( عليه السلام ) يَضَعُ جَوْزِينَجَةً عَلَى الْأُخْرَى وَ يُنَاوِلُنِي .

en.hubeali: And it is reported by Nadir the servant who said,
‘Abu Al-Hassanasws placed one Jowzinja (a sweet) upon the other, and gave it to me’.
en.sarwar: 12. It is narrated from Nadir al-Khadim who has said the following “Abu al-Hassan, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, would place Jawzinajah (a type of sweet) one on top of the other, and then give them to me.’”
